scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @freeos/memory-core && npm run build --workspace @freeos/rag-core && npm run build --workspace @freeos/research-core && npm run build --workspace @freeos/voice-core && npm run build --workspace @freeos/tool-runner && tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @freeos/memory-core && npm run build --workspace @freeos/rag-core && npm run build --workspace @freeos/research-core && npm run build --workspace @freeos/voice-core && npm run build --workspace @freeos/tool-runner && tsc -p tsconfig.json
